children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out this part, there are authorized to be appropriated $604,000,000 for fiscal year 2007, $626,300,000 for fiscal year 2008, $649,500,000 for fiscal year 2009, $681,975,000 for fiscal year 2010, $716,074,000 for fiscal year 2011, $751,877,000 for fiscal year 2012, and $789,471,000 for fiscal year 2013. Amounts appropriated under the preceding sentence for a fiscal year are available for obligation by the Secretary until the end of the second succeeding fiscal year.

children.label: A
children.text: $458,310,000 for grants under subpart I; and

children.label: B
children.text: $145,690,000 for grants under .section 300ff–19 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Secretary shall reserve an amount for grants under subpart I; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary shall reserve an amount for grants under .section 300ff–19 of this title

children.heading: Transfer of certain amounts; change in status as eligible area or transitional area
children.label: c Transfer of certain amounts; change in status as eligible area or transitional area
i
children.text: the amount reserved under paragraph (1)(A) or (2)(A) of subsection (b) of this section for the first such subsequent year of not being an eligible area is deemed to be reduced by an amount equal to the amount of the grant made pursuant to for the metropolitan area for the preceding fiscal year; andsection 300ff–13(a) of this title

children.label: I
children.text: if the metropolitan area qualifies for such first subsequent fiscal year as a transitional area under 300ff–19 of this title, the amount reserved under paragraph (1)(B) or (2)(B) of subsection (b) for such fiscal year is deemed to be increased by an amount equal to the amount of the reduction under subparagraph (A) for such year; or1So in original. Probably should be preceded by “section”.1

children.label: II
children.text: if the metropolitan area does not qualify for such first subsequent fiscal year as a transitional area under 300ff–19 of this title, an amount equal to the amount of such reduction is, notwithstanding subsection (a), transferred and made available for grants pursuant to , in addition to amounts available for such grants under ; and1section 300ff–28(a)(1) of this titlesection 300ff–31b of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the amount reserved under paragraph (1)(A) or (2)(A) of subsection (b) of this section for such year is deemed to be reduced by an additional $500,000; and

children.label: ii
children.text: an amount equal to the amount of such additional reduction is, notwithstanding subsection (a), transferred and made available for grants pursuant to , in addition to amounts available for such grants under .section 300ff–28(a)(1) of this titlesection 300ff–31b of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the amount of the grant that, pursuant to , was made under for the metropolitan area for the preceding fiscal year; andsection 300ff–13(a) of this titlesection 300ff–19(d)(2)(A) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: subject to clause (ii), an amount equal to the amount of the reduction under subparagraph (A) for such year is, notwithstanding subsection (a), transferred and made available for grants pursuant to , in addition to amounts available for such grants under ; andsection 300ff–28(a)(1) of this titlesection 300ff–31b of this title

children.label: aa
children.text: for the first fiscal year of the metropolitan area not being a transitional area, 75 percent of the amount described in subparagraph (A)(i) for such area;

children.label: bb
children.text: for the second fiscal year of the metropolitan area not being a transitional area, 50 percent of such amount; and

children.label: cc
children.text: for the third fiscal year of the metropolitan area not being a transitional area, 25 percent of such amount; and

children.label: II
children.text: there shall be transferred and made available for grants pursuant to for the fiscal year, in addition to amounts available for such grants under , an amount equal to the total amount of the reduction for such fiscal year under subparagraph (A), less the amount transferred for such fiscal year under subclause (I).section 300ff–28(a)(1) of this titlesection 300ff–31b of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the amount reserved under subsection (b)(2)(B) of this section for the first such subsequent fiscal year of becoming an eligible area is deemed to be reduced by an amount equal to the amount of the grant that, pursuant to , was made under for the metropolitan area for the preceding fiscal year; andsection 300ff–13(a) of this titlesection 300ff–19(d)(2)(A) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the amount reserved under subsection (b)(2)(A) for such fiscal year is deemed to be increased by an amount equal to the amount of the reduction under subparagraph (A) for such year.

children.heading: Certain transfers; allocations between programs under subpart I
children.label: d Certain transfers; allocations between programs under subpart I

children.text: The reductions shall be made from amounts available for the single program referred to in (relating to supplemental grants).section 300ff–19(d)(2)(C) of this title
The reductions shall be made before the amounts referred to in paragraph (1) are used for purposes of .section 300ff–13(a)(4) of this title

If the amounts referred to in paragraph (1) are not sufficient for making all the reductions, the reductions shall be reduced until the total amount of the reductions equals the total of the amounts referred to in such paragraph.

children.heading: Rules of construction regarding first subsequent fiscal year
children.label: e Rules of construction regarding first subsequent fiscal year
children.text: Paragraphs (1) and (2) of subsection (c) apply with respect to each series of fiscal years during which a metropolitan area is an eligible area under subpart I or a transitional area under for a fiscal year and then for a subsequent fiscal year ceases to be such an area by reason of section 300ff–11(b) or 300ff–19(c)(2) of this title, respectively, rather than applying to a single such series. Paragraph (3) of subsection (c) applies with respect to each series of fiscal years during which a metropolitan area is a transitional area under for a fiscal year and then for a subsequent fiscal year becomes an eligible area under subpart I, rather than applying to a single such series.section 300ff–19 of this titlesection 300ff–19 of this title
